name: SGOV
shortDescription: Governance platform for the Safrochain ecosystem — proposals, voting, and community decision-making.
description: SGOV is the dedicated governance platform for Safrochain, enabling SAF token holders to submit proposals, vote on-chain, and participate in the direction of the network and ecosystem. Designed to bring transparent, community-driven decision-making to every aspect of the protocol.
statusNote: To be determined — governance platform under design.
